title: SASTRA Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant I Posts
description: The SASTRA Deemed University (SASTRA) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Assistant I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M. Pharm, M.Sc., M.E./M. Tech can apply for the SASTRA Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, a...
